caption: New dev/debug visual (Settings.show_engaged_highlight, HUD Menu → Engaged-soldier highlight): tints a unit's soldiers amber when they're in Unit.engaged_soldier_indices()'s returned set -- the soldiers the sim actually treats as melee/contact candidates this tick. Watch the amber ring track the block's LIVE outer edge as the squared Infantry unit takes casualties from the rear cavalry charge and its per-soldier array compacts, instead of drifting off to whatever the original grid predicted -- the exact bug UnitFormation.live_perimeter_indices fixes.
